summary: Completed comprehensive UI polish testing for Net Analizi page. All dashboard-aligned visual improvements verified successfully with no layout or logic regressions.
passed_tests: Page loads correctly with dev auth bypass
Card styling uses rounded-2xl with soft shadows and increased padding
Card titles use text-xl for stronger, more premium appearance
Input fields have modern styling with soft background and improved focus states
Empty states are properly centered and clean
Dark mode maintains dashboard navy/soft-surface design language
Light mode maintains consistent visual language
Data appears correctly in Net Geçmişi section
Form validation works for empty submissions
No console errors or UI errors
